recommendations.title: Paradise Hills
recommendations.overview: A young woman is sent to Paradise Hills to be reformed, only to learn that the high-class facility's beautiful facade hides a sinister secret.

recommendations.title: The Hunter
recommendations.overview: Martin, a mercenary, is sent from Europe by an anonymous biotech company to the Tasmanian wilderness on a hunt for the last Tasmanian tiger.

recommendations.title: Wilderness
recommendations.overview: Juvenile delinquents are sent to a small British island after a fellow prisoner's death, where they must fight for survival.

recommendations.title: Those Who Wish Me Dead
recommendations.overview: A young boy finds himself pursued by two assassins in the Montana wilderness, with a survival expert determined to protect him, and a forest fire threatening to consume them all.

recommendations.title: Three Days and a Life
recommendations.overview: Christmas 1999, in a peaceful little village in the Ardennes. The life of a young boy named Antoine will soon be devastated by three tragic events : the death of a dog, the vanishing of a child, and a big ravaging storm.

recommendations.title: Driving Lessons
recommendations.overview: A shy teenage boy trying to escape the influence of his domineering mother, has his world changed when he begins to work for a retired actress.

recommendations.title: The Kingdom
recommendations.overview: A team of U.S. government agents is sent to investigate the bombing of an American facility in the Middle East.

recommendations.title: Scum
recommendations.overview: Powerful, uncompromising drama about two boys' struggle for survival in the nightmare world of Britain's notorious Borstal Reformatory.

recommendations.title: The Ninth Configuration
recommendations.overview: Army psychiatrist Colonel Kane is posted to a secluded gothic castle housing a military asylum. With a reserved calm, he indulges the inmates' delusions, allowing them free rein to express their fantasies.

recommendations.title: Bring Her Back
recommendations.overview: Following the death of their father, a brother and sister are sent to live with a foster mother, only to learn that she is hiding a terrifying secret.
